level_descriptions.novice: Limited or inaccurate grasp of the concepts; indicators are named but not applied; ideas are unclear or unsupported. Would need significant guidance on the job.
level_descriptions.developing: Basic grasp of the concepts; defines the indicators but does not connect them to solve the situation; ideas are present but have gaps in reasoning or evidence.
level_descriptions.proficient: Solid grasp; explains and connects the indicators to solve the situation; ideas are logical, well developed, and supported with appropriate evidence.
level_descriptions.exemplary: Comprehensive grasp applied effectively, even in more complex contexts; strategically connects the indicators; ideas are logical, well supported with business reasoning, practical, and clearly relevant to the real world.

items.label: Unique
items.desc: Original thinking, fresh perspective, and an insightful approach.

items.label: Practical
items.desc: An actionable, viable solution that works in a real-world context.

items.label: Effective
items.desc: A solution that achieves relevant outcomes.

items.label: Critical Thinking
items.desc: Think critically to understand and solve problems.

items.label: Communication
items.desc: Communicate clearly, effectively, and with reason.

overall_impression.label: Overall Impression
overall_impression.desc: Overall career readiness through professionalism, poise, and confidence.
